privileged_info_summary: This task uses a real EEG recording from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (eegmmidb 1.0.0), specifically subject S001's baseline eyes-open recording. The data is sampled at 250 Hz and contains 8 EEG channels with Fp1 (Channel 1) being the target for eye blink detection. The first eye blink artifact occurs at 0.624 seconds using the standard 80 microvolts threshold. The task requires users to identify this timestamp within a tolerance of 1.5 seconds using the OpenBCI GUI playback interface.
